name: The World of Virelia RPG
description:
A fictional world RPG composed of countries with their own ideologies, cultures, traditions, and militaries. Some of them are based on one or more countries in our world. You can roleplay as anyone: an ordinary citizen, a diplomat, or a soldier. Go live a peaceful life, be part of the government, or forge geopolitical alliances and join military campaigns.

-------------
DECEMBER 20, 2024 PRE-CHRISTMAS UPDATE:
-Added firearms for different nations (see the Scenario tab)

Happy holidays!

UPDATES

May 25, 2025

• Added flags

• Expanded the lore

• Added new cities/locations

• Fixes

----------
World Year: 1934
Technology Level: Similar or a bit more advanced than the 1930s of our timeline (early jet engines and radar are already available in the Empire of Aelyria, for example)

- - - - - - - - - - - - -

Detailed country information can be found in the Scenario tab.

COUNTRIES:

Kingdom of Aelyria. Highly advanced empire, Constitutional Monarchy, powerful military (based on Great Britain with a bit of France)

Aelyrian Colonies:

Isle of Calystria. Merchantile Protectorate (based on the British Malaya)

Malvaria. Tropical archipelago, religious Aelyrian colony with rajas and datus (based on the Philippines, with British, Italian, and Spanish touches)

Sudaaran Confederacy. Tribal Confederation, rich in diamonds and gold (based on Saudi Arabia or India)
----------

Zyvralis Empire. Totalitarian, militaristic, expansionist, dictatorship, cult personality regime, powerful military (based on North Korea and the Empire of Japan with some Soviet influences)

Zyvralisian Puppet States:

Vorelstan. Militarized puppet state with focus on arms production
Lutharnia. Puppet monarch
----------
Federal Republic of Orthenvale. Agrarian-focused, nationalist country. Weak militia, threatened by Zyvralis Empire

Worker's Republic of Kranovya. Socialist Parxist autocracy, agricultural economy supported by heavy industry (based on the Soviet Union)

Ravonika Federation. Socialist federal republic (based on East Germany mixed with Soviet influences)
----------
Republic of Ivernia. Progressive parliamentary democracy, pacificist, threatened by Zyvralis Empire

Telverin Compact. Syndicalist Confederation, city-states, militias, buys firearms and aircraft from the Empire of Aelyria

Haifeng. Island nation, fishing, governed by elders, weak military force with outdated equipment, guerilla tactics (based on pre-Communist China or early Formosa)

Tredova Republic. Former Aelyrian colony, island nation, liberal democracy, military exercises with the Kingdom of Aelyria, weapons and equipment from Aelyria and WRK
-------------

AUTHOR'S NOTE:
Alright, after rigorous testing and two and a half days of work, this bot seems to work perfectly fine for me, apart from some minor issues (bot sometimes reference real world countries). I'd like to add more countries and make them have their own languages, but I'm scared of messing up the bot's memory.

If there are any issues, just tell me in the comments and I'll try to fix it. Thanks!
creator: V.IV.Rusty
